attempted_route: prolif.Fingerprint().run(u.trajectory[0:10], ligand, protein) + fp.to_dataframe(return_atoms=False); long-format reshape with frame index appended to column name; Y=int(bool(value))
observation: TypeError: Fingerprint.to_dataframe() got an unexpected keyword argument 'return_atoms' at line 81; fp.run() completed 10/10 frames successfully; exit_code=1 after 4s
rationale: The installed ProLIF version does not expose 'return_atoms' as a keyword to to_dataframe(); the agent assumed a newer API signature without verifying the installed version's actual method signature.
recommended_alternative: Call fp.to_dataframe() with no arguments (prolif >= 2.0 default omits return_atoms); if atoms columns appear, drop MultiIndex levels with df.columns.droplevel() or use df.xs() before reshaping to long format with frame index.
